character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A serene divine seer in pale cream robes trimmed with gold brocade, hooded but face visible. Eyes glowing faint gold, irises replaced with holy light — prophetic blindness. Holds a gilded scroll-case and a golden sun-medallion on a chain. Thin circlet of beaten gold across brow. Wispy white beard or braided hair. Faint golden halo-shimmer around head. Hands weathered, serene. Palette: pale gold #F5E6A3, deep gold #C9A961, white #FFFFFF. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
